home.title: Your Complete Wellness Journey

footer.wellnessBlurb: Your complete wellness companion for tracking nutrition, fitness, health, and mental wellbeing. Transform your life one day at a time.

chatbot.title: Nutrition AI Chatbot
chatbot.subtitle: Get personalized diet recommendations based on your profile
chatbot.feature1Desc: AI-powered suggestions tailored to your weight, height, and goals
chatbot.feature2Desc: Monitor your nutrition journey with detailed insights
chatbot.feature3Desc: Ask questions and get real-time nutritional advice
chatbot.goalsPlaceholder: e.g., Lose weight, build muscle, increase energy, manage diabetes...
chatbot.greeting: Hello! I see you weigh {{weight}}kg, are {{height}}cm tall, have a {{activity}} activity level, and your goal is: {{goals}}. I'll provide personalized nutrition recommendations. What would you like to know?

errors.title: Please fix the following errors:
errors.invalidWeight: Weight must be between 1 and 500 kg
errors.invalidHeight: Height must be between 1 and 300 cm
errors.emptyGoals: Please tell us your fitness goals

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.sentCode: We sent a code to your email: {{email}}
twoFactor.noCodeReceived: Didn't receive the code? Check your spam folder or request a new one.
twoFactor.enableSuccess: A code has been sent to your email to enable 2FA
twoFactor.protectedDesc: Your account is protected with 2FA. An additional code is required to sign in.
twoFactor.enableDesc: Improve your account security by enabling 2FA.

recommendations.title: Personalized Recommendations
recommendations.increaseActivityDesc: You've completed fewer than 3 workouts. Try adding at least 30 minutes of moderate exercise today.
recommendations.maintainExerciseDesc: You're doing well, but you can do better. Consider increasing the intensity or duration of your workouts.
recommendations.practiceMeditationDesc: Meditation improves mental health. Try meditating for at least 10 minutes a day.
recommendations.drinkMoreWaterDesc: Stay hydrated. The goal is to drink 2-3 liters of water per day.
recommendations.startStreakDesc: Today is the perfect day to start. Complete at least one wellness activity today.
